calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brian C. Johnson, Esq. of The Chanler Group, T:510.848.8880, for plaintiff/moving party;
Rebecca L. Woodson, Esq. of Dentons US, LLP, T:415.267.4000, for defendant Big Tex Trailer
Manuracturing, Inc., by Court Call.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment as follows:

Englander's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the Health and Safety Code.

ORDER and JUDGMENT SIGNED.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.
